Change 1: Replace:
  # First, add main subject information
      if main_subject and main_subject in subject_triples:
          main_triples = subject_triples[main_subject]
          for i, t in enumerate(main_triples):
              clause = phrase(t, is_relative_clause=False, combine_with_prev=(i > 0))

with:
  # First, add main subject information as a single combined clause
      if main_subject and main_subject in subject_triples:
          main_triples = subject_triples[main_subject]
          # Build property phrases without repeating the subject
          prop_phrases = []
          for t in main_triples:
              # Generate a phrase for the predicate; we will strip the subject later
              prop = phrase(t, is_relative_clause=False, combine_with_prev=False)
              # Remove leading subject if present (e.g., "X has ...")
              prefix = f"{t.subject} "
              if prop.lower().startswith(prefix.lower()):
                  prop = prop[len(prefix):]
              prop_phrases.append(prop.strip())
          # Combine the property phrases into one clause
          if len(prop_phrases) == 1:
              clause = f"{main_subject} {prop_phrases[0]}"
          else:
              clause = f"{main_subject} " + ", ".join(prop_phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + prop_phrases[-1]
          all_clauses.append(clause)
          processed_subjects.add(main_subject)
